case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. TULIO C MONTES et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTES, TULIO C $2,413.55 PRINCIPAL, $242.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,656.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MONTES, TULIO C DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-11-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK SERVED JAN-19-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MONTES, TULIO C
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $242.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MONTES, TULIO C
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT: 1. DEFAULT JUDGMENT 2. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS 3. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS ( CCP 1033 ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MONTES, TULIO C
WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $686.20 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MONTES, TULIO C
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MONTES, TULIO C
